items.body:
🔴 **Tool Issue** — `src/api/usageManagementContext.ts:37`

```ts
const userAgentInfo = `azsdk-js-arm-commerce/1.0.0-beta.1`;
```

The user-agent version `1.0.0-beta.1` does not match the package version `4.0.0-beta.4` declared in `package.json`. These must be kept in sync.

**Fix:** Update this string to `azsdk-js-arm-commerce/4.0.0-beta.4`, then report the version sync bug in the [generation tool repository](https://github.com/Azure/autorest.typescript/issues) so the generator sets the correct version automatically.

1 tool issue found in this PR.

<details>
<summary>📊 Structured Report</summary>

```json
{"agent":"mgmt-reviewer","pr":38015,"summary":"issues_found","findings":[{"file":"sdk/commerce/arm-commerce/src/api/usageManagementContext.ts","line":37,"issueType":"tool","category":"version-mismatch","description":"userAgentInfo is set to '1.0.0-beta.1' but package.json declares version '4.0.0-beta.4'; these must match."}]}
```

</details>

## Next Steps to Merge
Only failed checks and required actions are listed below.

- 🔄 **pnpm-lock conflict**: `mergeable_state: dirty` — merge conflict in `pnpm-lock.yaml`. Follow the [conflict guide](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-js/blob/main/documentation/resolve-pnpm-lock-merge-conflict.md) to fix this issue.
